mnemonics.title: Preorder Mnemonic
mnemonics.content: PREORDER = NODE BEFORE CHILDREN. THINK 'ROOT FIRST' - N L R = NODE LEFT RIGHT. REMEMBER: PRINT BEFORE GOING DOWN LEFT OR RIGHT.

mnemonics.title: Inorder Mnemonic
mnemonics.content: INORDER = LEFT THEN NODE THEN RIGHT. THINK 'MIDDLE' - LNR. FOR BST: INORDER GIVES SORTED ORDER. REMEMBER: GO ALL THE WAY LEFT BEFORE PRINTING.

mnemonics.title: Postorder Mnemonic
mnemonics.content: POSTORDER = CHILDREN BEFORE PARENT. THINK 'LEAVES FIRST' - LRN. USEFUL FOR DELETION: CHILDREN GONE BEFORE PARENT. REMEMBER: CHECK CHILDREN BEFORE NODE.

mnemonics.title: Level Order Mnemonic
mnemonics.content: LEVEL ORDER = QUEUE APPROACH. THINK 'HORIZONTAL FIRST' - ALL NODES AT DEPTH D BEFORE DEPTH D+1. LIKE WATER WAVES SPREADING OUT. REMEMBER: QUEUE = FIFO.

acronyms.usage: Preorder traversal order - visit Node, then Left subtree, then Right subtree
Inorder traversal order - visit Left subtree, then Node, then Right subtree
Postorder traversal order - visit Left subtree, then Right subtree, then Node
Same as Level Order traversal - explores level by level using queue
Includes Preorder, Inorder, Postorder - explores depth before breadth
Inorder traversal of BST always gives sorted sequence

visualTips.visualization: DRAW THE TREE ON PAPER. LABEL NODES CLEARLY. DRAW RECURSIVE CALLS AS BRANCHES COMING DOWN. FOR INORDER, DRAW A HORIZONTAL LINE THAT SWEEPS LEFT-TO-RIGHT VISITING NODES WHERE IT CROSSES.
THINK OF RECURSION AS GOING DOWN A MAZE WITH MARKERS. YOU MARK A NODE WHEN YOU VISIT IT. FOR INORDER: GO FULLY LEFT (PUSHING NODES), THEN PROCESS (POP AND VISIT), THEN GO RIGHT.
IMAGINE A CONVEYOR BELT. NODES ENTER FROM BACK, EXIT FROM FRONT. WHEN A NODE EXITS, ITS CHILDREN ENTER BEHIND IT. THIS ENSURES PARENTS ARE PROCESSED BEFORE THEIR CHILDREN.
THINK OF STACK AS A PILE OF PAPERS. FOR ITERATIVE INORDER: KEEP GOING LEFT PUSHING NODES, WHEN STUCK POP AND VISIT, THEN MOVE RIGHT. STACK REMEMBERS YOUR PATH BACK.

analogies.analogy: LIKE READING A BOOK FROM BEGINNING: YOU READ THE CHAPTER TITLE (ROOT) FIRST, THEN ALL OF CHAPTER A (LEFT SUBTREE), THEN CHAPTER B (RIGHT SUBTREE). THIS IS TOP-DOWN DOCUMENTATION.
LIKE COUNTING PEOPLE IN A LINE WHERE EACH PERSON STANDS BETWEEN THEIR TWO CHILDREN: PARENT STANDS BETWEEN ALL LEFT FAMILY MEMBERS AND RIGHT FAMILY MEMBERS. FOR BST, THIS CREATES PERFECT SORTED ORDER.
LIKE CLEANING A HOUSE ROOM BY ROOM: YOU CLEAN ALL ITEMS IN A ROOM (LEFT/RIGHT SUBTREES) BEFORE LEAVING THE ROOM (VISITING PARENT). MUST FINISH CHILD TASKS BEFORE PARENT CAN LEAVE.
LIKE A PYRAMID SCHEME OR ORG CHART MEETING: CEO (ROOT) MEETS FIRST, THEN ALL MANAGERS (LEVEL 2), THEN ALL SUPERVISORS (LEVEL 3). HORIZONTAL PROMOTION BEFORE VERTICAL.
LIKE EXPLORING A CAVE WITH A STRING: YOU TIE STRING AT ENTRANCE, GO DEEP AS POSSIBLE, MARK WALLS, WHEN STUCK BACKTRACK ALONG STRING. THE STRING (CALL STACK) REMEMBERS YOUR PATH.
BALANCED TREE = LADDER (SHORT PATH UP). SKEWED TREE = TELEPHONE POLE (LONG CHAIN). RECURSION SPACE = HEIGHT OF WHAT YOU CLIMB. LADDER IS EASY, POLE IS TALL AND RISKY.
